specific_question: What percentage of the copywriters on the marketing team have cited "career advancement" and "insufficient training" as key reasons for applying to the new certification training program in the Q4 2024 anonymous employee satisfaction survey?
answer: According to the Q4 2024 anonymous employee satisfaction survey, 22% of the copywriting team have attributed their desire to join the new certification training program to "career advancement", while 33% reported "insufficient training" as another key reason.
